candidates.notes: Pipeline runs end-to-end on GPT-2 Small, but Gemma-2-2B is gated and inaccessible. Simplified absorption/hedging proxies are too coarse for full-scale evaluation. Dead-neuron estimates unreliable at 2k tokens. Need proper sae-spelling metric and larger corpus before full run.

fallback_executed.reason: google/gemma-2-2b is a gated HuggingFace repository and no HF token is configured in the environment.
